arts.ttl: Patrice Evra: France don’t want to risk Real Madrid issue over Kylian Mbappe
arts.sum: Former Manchester United and France star Patrice Evra believes Les Bleus are playing politics over their decision not to call up Kylian Mbappe . Didier Deschamps confirmed his squad in midweek ahead of two incoming UEFA Nations League games against Israel and Belgium. arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd eye bid for Wharton; Real Madrid's plan to sign Alexander-Arnold revealed
arts.sum: Barcelona and Atletico Madrid are interested in signing Thomas Partey once his contract expires in summer 2025. Arsenal are plotting a move for 18-year-old Barcelona starlet Arnau Pradas .

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Real Madrid vs Villarreal, 2024 La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Villarreal in La Liga. Real Madrid starting XI: Lunin, Carvajal, Tchouameni, Rudiger, Mendy, Camavinga, Valverde, Bellingham, Modric, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Why Barcelona Will Wear Coldplay Sponsored Shirt Against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona will wear a Coldplay inspired kit when they face off with Real Madrid on October 26th as part of the club's sponsorship deal.

arts.ttl: Ex-Real Madrid wonderkid makes bold decision to continue career in Malaysia
arts.sum: Jese Rodriguez is the perfect example of a journeyman footballer. The 31-year-old showed a lot of promise during his early years as a Real Madrid player, but since leaving for Paris Saint-Germain in 2016, he has been on the move very regularly. In 2023 alone, Jese played for three clubs: Ankaragucu, Sampdoria and Coritiba. arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti reacts to Kylian Mbappe's omission from France squad
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti has hinted that France's decision not to call up Kylian Mbappe for October international due was influenced by Real Madrid's medical staff. Addressing the decision made by Deschamps, Madrid manager Ancelotti has hinted that the club's medical staff recommended that he rests during the international break, despite passing him fit to feature this week in La Liga.
The brass at La Liga giants Real Madrid are reportedly keeping a close eye on the development of Nico Paz, at Como. Youngster Paz, for his part, secured a departure…
